title: gentiana verna subsp. aestiva
intro: Gentiana verna subsp. aestiva, also known as the Spring Gentian, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Gentian family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the Spring Gentian has been used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which have been found to aid in the treatment of various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome, and its potential to help manage stress and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the Spring Gentian is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
